name: property managers overseeing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 properties, overdue maintenance tasks cause tenant dissatisfaction. We automate task monitoring instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or email.
problem_solved: Overdue maintenance tasks lead to tenant dissatisfaction and potential property damage.
